body: Kofi, great catching up with you at the [Greentown Labs](org/greentown-labs) summit last week — always good to swap notes with someone who's thinking as carefully about the climate-AI intersection as you are. I wanted to follow up on our conversation about the grid optimization space, because we've been seeing a real uptick in founders tackling demand-side flexibility in ways that feel genuinely differentiated from the first wave. A couple of the teams I've been diligencing are approaching compute load scheduling as a native grid asset, which is a framing I hadn't fully appreciated until recently. Would love to know if you're tracking anything similar on your end, or if there are specific sub-sectors where [Beacon VC](people/kofi-mensah) is feeling more or less conviction these days. Happy to set up a call if it's easier to talk through — I'm generally free mornings next week.
